spec_match.rationale: Accurately attempts window-level document.requestStorageAccessFor diagnostics against standard browser interfaces.

interactive.rationale: Provides a direct, customizable text input for origins and a 'Call' button that invokes the API, displaying the verdict in distinct, color-coded boxes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent description of attempting a real call and reporting granted, denied, or undefined status.

edge_cases.rationale: Safely tests for the existence of the method on document before invoking, and implements try-catch to catch standard SecurityErrors or syntax exceptions.

references.rationale: Directly references the main index and ChromeStatus database on the page.

design_system.rationale: Perfect styling utilizing flat borders, card padding, crumb lists, and color-mix variables.

openQuestions.title: Add a pre-flight checklist of necessary criteria
openQuestions.detail: Calling requestStorageAccessFor requires several strict pre-conditions (like a prior user gesture, a secure context, and RWS alignment). We could add a little sidebar checklist showing which of these criteria are met before the user clicks the 'Call' button.

summary: A solid, robust, and highly compliant interactive diagnostic page. By executing real-time checks of the document.requestStorageAccessFor API, protecting the call with try-catch validation, and reporting precise results, it serves as a perfect diagnostic reference.
